steps.title: Compare achievement and legacy
steps.content: The first two sentences list Hammurabi's many major achievements. The next sentence narrows his modern reputation to one achievement, the Code of Hammurabi. That shift is contrary to what the broad list might suggest.

steps.title: Choose the contrast signal
steps.content: A signals a result, B signals similarity, and D introduces an example. None fits the movement from many accomplishments to being mainly remembered for a single law code. The transition needs to signal contrast. The answer is C.
